description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with a broad white reflective stripe around its upper section, both of which are heavily marked by dirt, scuffs, and signs of wear. The surface appears to be made of flexible rubber or PVC, showing a matte, slightly rough finish with visible grime and fading. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, with no attachments or openings. The base is thick, flat, and extends outward from the cone, providing a sturdy foundation and showing additional signs of abrasion and dirt accumulation. No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn, orange traffic cone with a wide, dirty base and a single white reflective stripe, showing heavy use and grime.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange cone with a prominent white stripe and heavy dirt marks, especially on the lower half and base.
description_view_1: This side highlights more blackened areas and scuff marks, with the white stripe appearing slightly faded.
description_view_2: The cone appears darker overall, with the orange and white colors more muted and the base showing significant wear.
description_view_3: This view displays a brighter orange section and a clearer white stripe, with visible grime and surface abrasions.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, white reflective stripe encircles the upper third of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and flat, made of thick rubber or PVC, with visible dirt and abrasion for added stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuffs, fading, and grime throughout.
